sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 2.67M-share stake in Thor Industries (NYSE: THO)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management disclosed a 5.07% passive ownership stake in Thor Industries (NYSE: THO), totaling 2,670,866 shares of common stock as of March 31, 2026, through a Schedule 13G filing. The filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 400,685 shares, consistent with its role as a large index/asset manager. This disclosure reflects holdings managed across various Vanguard affiliates and funds.

feed.title: [ARS] Taboola.com Ltd. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by Taboola.com Ltd. (TBLA) on April 30, 2026, with a low impact and neutral sentiment. It provides a link to the full PDF document on SEC EDGAR and lists recent news and other SEC filings related to the company, along with key stock data.

feed.title: Teucrium Agricultural Fund (NYSE Arca: TAGS) offers Creation Baskets at NAV
feed.summary: The Teucrium Agricultural Fund (TAGS) offers continuously tradable shares providing exposure to corn, soybeans, wheat, and sugar through investments in four Teucrium Underlying Funds. Creation Baskets, consisting of 12,500 shares, can be purchased at Net Asset Value (NAV) by Authorized Purchasers, while secondary market trades occur on NYSE Arca. The prospectus outlines key figures, risks including commodity price volatility and tracking error, and the operational structure where the Fund is not actively managed but aims to track the combined performance of its Underlying Funds.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] SYNAPTICS Inc Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G indicating a passive investment in Synaptics Inc, holding 1,978,223 shares, which represents 5.10% of the class. The filing details show 296,715 shares with sole voting power and 1,978,223 shares with sole dispositive power. This Schedule 13G was signed by Ashley Grim on April 30, 2026, marking a passive ownership report for the investment firm.

feed.title: TBBK (NASDAQ: TBBK) CMO sells 8,400 shares, retains 24,942
feed.summary: Bancorp, Inc.'s EVP & Chief Marketing Officer, Maria Wainwright, sold 8,400 shares of common stock on April 28, 2026, at an average price of $60.2405 per share. Following this open-market transaction, she directly retains 24,942 shares. The sale, detailed in a Form 4 filing, signals a net seller activity of 8,400 shares valued at approximately $506,020.

feed.title: [Form 4] TSAKOS ENERGY NAVIGATION LTD Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Nikolaos Tsakos, CEO of Tsakos Energy Navigation Ltd. (TEN), reported that an affiliated entity, Intermed Champion S.A. of Panama, purchased 25,000 common shares of TEN in open-market transactions. These purchases were made in two blocks at weighted average prices of $39.9189 and $39.9484 per share, totaling approximately $998,341. Following these transactions, Intermed Champion S.A. holds 918,500 common shares, with additional indirect holdings also reported.

feed.title: Brag House CEO takes Wall Street investor summit stage on May 5
feed.summary: Brag House (NASDAQ: TBH) announced its CEO and co-founder, Lavell Juan Malloy, will present at the Market Movers Investor Summit on May 5, 2026, at 48 Wall Street. He will discuss the company's media-tech platform and its engagement with Gen Z audiences. The summit is a high-access event featuring company presentations, one-on-one meetings, and fireside chats with notable figures like Alex Rodriguez and Grant Cardone.

feed.title: Airport and rail projects helped Ten-League nearly triple net income
feed.summary: Ten-League International Holdings Limited (TLIH) reported a significant increase in its fiscal year 2025 financial results, with revenue rising 30.2% to S$76.2 million and net income soaring 196.5% to S$5.6 million. This growth was primarily driven by strong demand in Singapore’s infrastructure sector, including major projects like Changi Airport Terminal 5 and MRT developments. The company also completed its initial public offering, commenced Nasdaq trading, and saw a positive market reaction with its stock gaining over 23%.

feed.title: BlackRock (SSNC) reports 3.7% holding — 8.81M shares disclosed
feed.summary: BlackRock Portfolio Management LLC has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, disclosing a beneficial ownership of 8,813,929 shares of SS&C Technologies Holdings Inc. This represents a 3.7% stake in the company, with BlackRock holding sole voting power for 8,575,970 shares and sole dispositive power for all 8,813,929 shares. The filing indicates a passive investment, clarifying that these holdings are aggregated from certain BlackRock, Inc. Reporting Business Units.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (STC) reports 5.09% ownership of Stewart Information Corp
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 5.09% beneficial ownership in Stewart Information Services Corp, totaling 1,553,478 shares. Filed via a Schedule 13G, this indicates a passive investment with Vanguard retaining sole dispositive power over all shares and sole voting power over 223,773 shares. The holdings are distributed across various Vanguard funds and managed accounts.

feed.title: Suzano (SUZ) CEO receives large performance-based restricted share awards
feed.summary: Suzano S.A. CEO Joao Alberto Fernandez de Abreu received two grants of performance-based restricted shares as equity compensation, totaling 290,391 shares. These awards are issued at a stated price of $0.0000 per share and have vesting conditions tied to the company's Total Shareholder Return (TSR) relative to its Brazilian industry peers, with a multiplier ranging from 75% to 125%. This compensation mechanism aims to align the CEO's interests with shareholder performance.

feed.title: Silvaco Group (NASDAQ: SVCO) shareholders back full 2026 board slate
feed.summary: Silvaco Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SVCO) held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders on April 22, 2026, where shareholders elected all nominated directors to serve until the 2027 annual meeting. Approximately 74% of outstanding shares were represented at the meeting, and vote totals for the individual nominees demonstrated strong shareholder support. The filing also clarifies key figures regarding shares outstanding, shares represented, and individual director election votes.

feed.title: Spok Posts Strong Q1 Results, Emphasizes AI and Dividends
feed.summary: Spok Holdings (SPOK) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, including a 57% year-over-year growth in software managed services revenue and a net income of $2 million. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.3125 per share, highlighted strategic realignments including workforce reduction for cost savings, and emphasized the role of AI in driving efficiency and product development. With a debt-free balance sheet and a dividend yield exceeding 10%, Spok is positioned as a cash-generative healthcare communications player focusing on recurring revenue and shareholder payouts.

feed.title: [ARS] Spok Holdings, Inc SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS filing by Spok Holdings, Inc. on April 30, 2026, accessible as a PDF document through SEC EDGAR. The filing indicates low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides recent news and SEC filings related to Spok Holdings, Inc. (SPOK), along with stock data and rankings.

feed.title: Surf Air Mobility (NYSE: SRFM) updates governance, pay and ownership in 10-K/A
feed.summary: Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE: SRFM) filed an amendment (10-K/A) to its 2025 annual report to include detailed information on its directors, executive compensation, ownership, and related-party transactions, without altering financial statements. The filing outlines executive salaries, stock awards, bonus structures tied to strategic and financial targets, and significant equity holdings by major shareholders. It also details various financing relationships, including secured convertible promissory notes and advisory service agreements with affiliated entities.

feed.title: Sterling Infrastructure (NASDAQ:STRL) Reaches New 1-Year High - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Sterling Infrastructure (NASDAQ:STRL) shares reached a new 52-week high of $517.00 after reporting strong quarterly results, beating EPS and revenue expectations. The company also provided optimistic FY 2026 guidance, and analysts maintain a bullish "Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $510.00. Institutional investors hold a significant portion of the stock, while recent insider transactions show some selling activity.

feed.title: Strattec (NASDAQ: STRT) dropped as guarantor on new JV credit facility
feed.summary: Strattec Security Corporation (NASDAQ: STRT) announced that its majority-owned joint venture, ADAC-STRATTEC, LLC, has entered into a new Amended and Restated Credit Agreement with BMO Bank N.A., effective April 30, 2026. This new agreement replaces a prior credit facility, consequently terminating Strattec's role as a guarantor, borrower, or other credit support party for the joint venture's debt. This change reduces Strattec's direct credit exposure to the facility.

feed.title: OceanPal Delays 20-F Amid Digital Pivot
feed.summary: OceanPal Inc. (SVRN) has delayed its Annual Report on Form 20-F for 2025 due to complexities arising from its strategic transformation into a digital asset treasury vehicle. This pivot involves holding NEAR Protocol native tokens and introduces new accounting challenges related to digital asset valuation, custody, and staking rewards. The company anticipates significant changes in its 2025 operating results, shifting from shipping revenues to digital asset income and related expenses.

feed.title: High-vote founder control and pay up for vote at StubHub (STUB) 2026 meeting
feed.summary: StubHub Holdings, Inc. (STUB) will hold its virtual 2026 annual shareholder meeting on June 23, 2026, where shareholders will vote on electing seven directors, ratifying PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditor, approving executive compensation on an advisory basis, and deciding the frequency of future say-on-pay votes. The company is classified as a "controlled company" because founder and CEO Eric H. Baker holds over 50% of the combined voting power through a dual-class share structure (Class A shares with 1 vote, Class B shares with 100 votes). The proxy statement also details significant 2025 executive compensation, including a $5.49 million base salary for the CEO and large bonuses for other named executives.

feed.title: Synlogic (SYBX) details board, compensation and major holders in 2025 10-K/A
feed.summary: Synlogic, Inc. has filed an amendment to its 2025 Annual Report (10-K/A) to provide detailed information on its board of directors, executive and director compensation, corporate governance, and major shareholders. The filing reveals that the company's Board consists of four independent directors, and as of March 31, 2026, Synlogic had only one full-time employee focused on strategic transactions. Key financial figures include Principal Executive and Financial Officer Mary Beth Dooley's 2025 compensation of $335,500 and audit fees paid to KPMG LLP totaling $365,000 for the same year.

feed.title: 5 Best Robotics Stocks to Buy Under $30
feed.summary: The article highlights Stereotaxis, Inc. (NYSE: STXS) as one of the best robotics stocks under $30, citing its FDA-approved MAGiC catheter and recent acquisition of European robotics company Robocath. Stereotaxis's MAGiC system enables precise, computer-controlled catheter movement for minimally invasive cardiac ablation, successfully treating complex heart cases. The acquisition of Robocath is expected to provide Stereotaxis with commercial foothold in Europe and enhance its robotic surgical platform.

feed.title: Executive pay, ownership and board structure at Safe Pro Group (NASDAQ: SPAI)
feed.summary: Safe Pro Group (SPAI) has filed an amended annual report (10-K/A) to provide comprehensive details on its governance, executive and director compensation, security ownership, related-party transactions, and auditor fees. The filing indicates 20,884,586 shares of common stock outstanding as of March 31, 2026, and outlines the board's structure, independence, and specific compensation plans for executives, including CEO Daniyel Erdberg's 2025 total compensation of over $4.1 million. It also details the company's recoupment policy and auditor fees for 2025 and 2024.

feed.title: SNDK: Q3 revenue soared 97% sequentially, driven by datacenter and edge growth, with strong profitability
feed.summary: SNDK reported a significant Q3 performance, with revenue surging 97% sequentially to $5.95 billion, driven primarily by growth in its datacenter and edge segments. The company achieved a gross margin of 78.4% and net income of $23.41 per share, while also announcing a $6 billion share repurchase program. Looking ahead to Q4, SNDK anticipates further expansion in both revenue and margins.

feed.title: Stoke Therapeutics to Host Webcast and Conference Call to Discuss First Quarter 2026 Business and Financial Updates
feed.summary: Stoke Therapeutics (Nasdaq: STOK) announced it will host a webcast and conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. ET, to provide first quarter 2026 business and financial updates. The event will be accessible via their investor website, with registration details provided for analysts participating in the Q&A. Stoke Therapeutics is a biotechnology company focused on RNA medicine with its lead investigational medicine, zorevunersen, in development for Dravet syndrome.

feed.title: [8-K] SPX Technologies, Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: SPX Technologies (NYSE: SPXC) reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with revenue from continuing operations up 17.4% to $566.8 million and adjusted EPS rising 22.5% to $1.69. The company also increased its full-year 2026 guidance for revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and adjusted EPS, citing healthy demand across its key end markets and contributions from recent acquisitions. The HVAC segment saw a 22.0% revenue increase and the Detection & Measurement segment grew 8.3%, with improved margins.

feed.title: Teucrium Soybean Fund (NYSE Arca: SOYB) prospectus details Creation Baskets
feed.summary: The Teucrium Soybean Fund (SOYB) has filed a prospectus detailing its continuously offered exchange-traded Shares. The fund operates as a commodity pool, seeking to track the Teucrium Soybean Index by investing in soybean futures and cash equivalents. Key details include Creation Baskets of 25,000 Shares, a $300 per-order creation/redemption fee, a 1.00% management fee, and an illustrative NAV of $23.82, requiring a breakeven trading income of $0.15 (0.63%) over 12 months. The prospectus also outlines material risks such as correlation, contango/backwardation effects, and an extensive legal and regulatory risk disclosure.

feed.title: Party City is back — now inside Tri-State Staples stores
feed.summary: Party City, after filing for bankruptcy and closing many locations, is making a comeback by setting up mini-shops inside 700 Staples stores nationwide, including locations in the Tri-State area. This partnership allows customers to purchase party supplies and balloons alongside their office needs, and the launch coincides with graduation season. Staples is offering several promotions to celebrate this new merchandising strategy.

feed.title: SmartFinancial Raises Quarterly Dividend, Signals Ongoing Confidence
feed.summary: SmartFinancial (SMBK) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.09 per share, a 12.5% increase from the previous dividend. This dividend increase, payable on June 1, 2026, signals the company's commitment to returning capital to investors and confidence in its banking strategy. An AI analyst rates SMBK as "Outperform" due to solid fundamentals, a positive earnings outlook, and supportive technical momentum.

feed.title: CFO at SiriusPoint (NYSE: SPNT) receives 15,180-share RSU grant
feed.summary: SiriusPoint's (NYSE: SPNT) Chief Financial Officer, James J. McKinney, received a grant of 15,180 Common Shares as Restricted Share Units (RSUs) on April 28, 2026, as part of his compensation. These RSUs will vest in equal annual installments over three years, contingent on continued employment. Following this grant, McKinney directly holds 56,979 Common Shares, including both RSUs and restricted shares.

feed.title: SiriusPoint (SPNT) CEO gets 48,625 RSUs, moves 775,029 shares
feed.summary: SiriusPoint Ltd. CEO Scott Egan received 48,625 Restricted Share Units (RSUs) as part of the company's 2023 Omnibus Incentive Plan, which will vest over three years. Concurrently, he transferred 775,029 common shares from direct to indirect ownership through Egan Family Investment Ltd. for estate planning purposes. After these transactions, Egan directly holds 913,071 common shares and indirectly holds 1,320,112 common shares.

feed.title: SiriusPoint (SPNT) Global Head of P&C awarded 10,717 RSUs in Form 4
feed.summary: Charles Patrick John, Global Head of P&C at SiriusPoint Ltd (SPNT), was awarded 10,717 Restricted Share Units (RSUs) as compensation, as detailed in a recent Form 4 filing. These RSUs, granted under the company's 2023 Omnibus Incentive Plan, will vest equally over three years, contingent on continued employment. Following this grant, John directly holds 146,726 common shares, encompassing both restricted shares and RSUs.

feed.title: SiriusPoint (SPNT) Group President awarded 19,926 RSUs, holds 677,696 shares
feed.summary: SiriusPoint Ltd. Group President David E. Govrin was granted 19,926 Restricted Share Units (RSUs) on April 28, 2026, as part of the company's 2023 Omnibus Incentive Plan. These RSUs will vest in equal annual installments over three years, contingent on his continued employment. Following this award, Govrin directly holds a total of 677,696 Common Shares, including the newly granted RSUs.

feed.title: Vanguard (SR) discloses 3.02M-share, 5.10% stake in Spire Inc (SR)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a 5.10% stake in Spire Inc (SR), representing 3,017,346 shares of common stock as of March 31, 2026. The filing indicates that Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares but sole voting power over only 470,116 shares. This passive investment is managed through various Vanguard funds and client accounts, rather than signaling an active control intent.

feed.title: Spire Divests Gas Marketing Unit to Boardwalk Pipelines
feed.summary: Spire has completed the sale of its gas marketing unit, Spire Marketing Inc., to Boardwalk Pipelines for $215 million, effective April 30, 2026. This divestiture allows Spire to focus on its regulated natural gas utility operations and will partially fund its acquisition of Piedmont Natural Gas Tennessee. Boardwalk Pipelines has formed Boardwalk Continuum Marketing, LLC, to integrate Spire Marketing's employees and clients, aiming to leverage its broader natural gas platform to offer enhanced services.

feed.title: Spire (SR) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.825 with 3.63% Yiel
feed.summary: Spire Inc. (SR) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.825 per share, maintaining its previous rate and offering a 3.63% forward yield. Despite a solid GF Score™ of 73/100, the company faces financial strength challenges due to high debt and low interest coverage. Spire is divesting certain natural gas operations to streamline its business, with its stock trading at a premium P/E ratio close to its historical median.

feed.title: Spire (NYSE: SR) completes $215M sale of gas marketing business
feed.summary: Spire Inc. (NYSE: SR) has completed the sale of its gas marketing business, Spire Marketing Inc., to Boardwalk Pipelines, LP for $215 million in cash, effective April 30, 2026. This divestiture allows Spire to sharpen its focus on regulated natural gas utility operations and improve its risk profile. Proceeds from the sale will partially fund Spire's acquisition of the Piedmont Natural Gas Tennessee business and be used for general corporate purposes.

feed.title: Smart Logistics (Nasdaq: SLGB) reports 2025 revenue dip, longer-haul growth
feed.summary: Smart Logistics Global (NASDAQ: SLGB) reported a 7.3% revenue decrease in fiscal year 2025, reaching $89.9 million due to reduced demand in coal and steel sectors, although gross profit margins improved to 4.7%. Despite the revenue dip, total transportation distance increased by 11.7%, indicating a shift towards longer-haul routes and improved efficiency. The company expanded its logistics network with a new Northern Supply Chain Center in Xuzhou, aiming to capitalize on a projected gradual economic recovery in the PRC in 2026.

feed.title: Alphabet Stock Climbs After Q1 EPS Blows Past Estimates: Details
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL, GOOG) reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter results, with EPS significantly beating estimates and revenue exceeding Street forecasts. The company saw strong growth in Google Services and Google Cloud, with CEO Sundar Pichai highlighting the success of the Gemini App and Gemini Enterprise, as well as Waymo's increased autonomous rides. Following the announcement, Alphabet's stock showed an increase in extended trading.

feed.title: BofA Securities Maintains Equinix Inc(EQIX.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $1,200
feed.summary: BofA Securities has reiterated its "Buy" rating for Equinix Inc (EQIX.US) and increased the target price to $1,200. This updated target suggests a potential upside of 32.22% from the stock's last closing price of $907.57. The report indicates continued analyst confidence in Equinix's performance.

feed.title: Strategic Turnaround Under Way at Dollar Tree, but Unlikely a Durable Moat Will Materialize
feed.summary: Dollar Tree is undergoing a strategic turnaround following the 2025 sale of Family Dollar, focusing on its remaining nearly 9,000 stores in the US and Canada. While the company aims to capitalize on value-conscious shoppers and impulse demand with sharp opening price points, Morningstar believes a durable economic moat is unlikely to materialize due to strong competition and the inherent vulnerability of its business model in dense urban and suburban areas. The article suggests that success relies heavily on consistent execution rather than structural advantages, making it susceptible to competition from mass merchants and online alternatives.

feed.title: AIG Underwriting Income More Than Triples in Q1
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) reported a significant increase in its General Insurance segment's underwriting income in Q1 2026, which nearly quadrupled to $774 million compared to the previous year. This growth was driven by reduced catastrophe losses, favorable prior year development, and strong performance across all subdivisions, including North America Commercial, International Commercial, and Global Personal. CEO Peter Zaffino, in his final quarterly report, highlighted impressive top-line growth and strategic transactions contributing to these results.

feed.title: Diluted earnings per share (diluted EPS) of Sound Point Meridian Capital, Inc. – NYSE:SPMC
feed.summary: This article provides financial information for Sound Point Meridian Capital, Inc. (NYSE:SPMC), specifically focusing on its diluted earnings per share (EPS). It indicates that the market was closed at the time of the data display. The content appears to be a financial data snippet from a trading platform.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) Posts Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $0.07 EPS
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst estimates by $0.07 EPS with $4.47, though revenue of $4.71 billion slightly missed expectations of $4.74 billion despite a 29% year-over-year increase. The growth was largely driven by a combination of 5% organic growth and 23% from mergers and acquisitions, with management reaffirming a 6% organic growth outlook for 2026. The company acknowledged headwinds in property pricing and reinsurance, which could impact future organic growth.

feed.title: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: SNOA) closes $4M stock and warrant sale
feed.summary: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals has closed a public unit offering, raising approximately $3.5 million in net proceeds after expenses. The offering included units of common stock or pre-funded warrants, complemented by common stock purchase warrants, with each unit priced at $1.35. The funds are earmarked for general corporate purposes and working capital.

feed.title: [8-K] SPS COMMERCE INC Reports Material Event
feed.summary: SPS Commerce (SPSC) filed an 8-K report detailing its Q1 2026 financial results, with revenue growing 6% to $192.1 million and Adjusted EBITDA increasing 7% to $57.9 million. While GAAP net income decreased, non-GAAP diluted EPS improved, and the company repurchased $47.1 million in stock. SPS Commerce also announced the launch of MAX, a new AI capability for supply chain workflows, and provided Q2 and full-year 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (SNDX) Syndax Pharmaceuticals Posts Q1 Loss $0.48, vs. FactSet Est of $0.61 Loss
feed.summary: Syndax Pharmaceuticals (SNDX) reported a Q1 loss of $0.48 per share, which is better than FactSet's estimated loss of $0.61 per share. The company is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm focused on developing cancer therapies, with product candidates including revumenib and axatilimab. They also reported Q1 revenue of $64.9 million, falling short of FactSet's estimate of $69.8 million.

feed.title: [8-K] Syndax Pharmaceuticals Inc Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Syndax Pharmaceuticals Inc. reported a significant increase in Q1 2026 revenue, reaching $64.9 million, a 224% year-over-year jump, primarily driven by strong launches of their drugs Revuforj and Niktimvo. Despite remaining loss-making, the company significantly narrowed its net loss to $42.7 million from $84.8 million a year prior. Syndax projects a path to profitability, anticipating its current cash, investments, and revenue streams will sufficiently cover operating expenses for 2026.

feed.title: Non-operating income (total) of SIFCO Industries, Inc. – TRADEGATE:SI7
feed.summary: This article displays the non-operating income (total) for SIFCO Industries, Inc. under the TRADEGATE:SI7 ticker. It provides financial data and indicates that the market for this stock is currently closed. The content is presented in a data table format, showing the period, value, change, and percentage change.

feed.title: [ARS] Synergy CHC Corp. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an SEC filing (Form ARS) by Synergy CHC Corp. (SNYR) on April 30, 2026, at 4:18 PM. The filing is categorized with low impact and neutral sentiment, and a PDF document is available for viewing. The article also provides a brief overview of SNYR's stock, market cap ranking, recent news, and other SEC filings.

feed.title: Massive equity plan, warrant and reverse split up for Synergy CHC (SNYR) vote
feed.summary: Synergy CHC Corp. (SNYR) is seeking stockholder approval for several key proposals at its 2026 virtual annual meeting on June 29, 2026. These include electing directors, ratifying auditors, significantly increasing its 2024 Equity Incentive Plan share reserve to 150,000,000 common shares and allowing repricing of awards, approving the full issuance of shares under a Lender Warrant for Nasdaq compliance, and authorizing a reverse stock split at a ratio of up to 1-for-200. These proposals aim to increase capital flexibility, maintain Nasdaq listing, and align executive and stockholder interests, despite potential dilution concerns and a reported net loss of $(12.3) million in 2025.
